persona.description: A careful shopper who repeatedly weighs price and value before engaging.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area. 2-5s: The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area. 5-8s: The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product. 8-10s: The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area.
The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area.
The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product.
The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a skincare aisle with soft shelf lighting; visible product setup: two skincare bottles beside tester pads and small shelf labels.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area.
The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area.
The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product.
The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a skincare aisle with soft shelf lighting; visible product setup: two skincare bottles beside tester pads and small shelf labels.
Customer behavior style: The shopper appears close to asking for help or making a concrete next move, but no purchase is completed.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area.
- 2-5s: The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area.
- 5-8s: The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product.
- 8-10s: The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.
Negative constraints: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
